design_philosophy.core_loop: Combat-focused platforming: progress through levels by defeating enemies and bosses, collecting power-ups and orbs for resource management, accessing bonus stages via bells for strategic progression.
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Resource scarcity (limited lives/continues, single power-up capacity, orb collection for health restoration) versus enemy pressure across five increasingly difficult levels.
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Embodying Jackie Chan as a martial arts action hero performing stunts and combat feats to rescue his sister.
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Unforgiving single-life structure with limited continues (5 initial) creates permanent consequence for failure; power-up system forces tactical choices (only one type active at a time); bonus stage integration ties progression to skill exploration rather than linear forced advancement.

difficulty.lives_system: Single life per continue; death resets all collected orbs and power-ups, forcing re-collection from enemies.
difficulty.continues_system: Five initial continues available; additional continues can be earned through bonus stage performance (point accumulation).
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: High agency through optional bonus stages (triggered by bells) that provide continue conservation and scoring opportunities; power-up selection strategy affects combat approach; orb collection management influences health restoration frequency.

progression.upgrade_system: Power-up acquisition (single active power-up per carry, various special attack types with limited use counts); charged beam attack (5 uses, replenished at 30 orbs collected); health restoration via orb accumulation (30 orbs = full health + 5 beam charges reset).
progression.unlock_mechanism: Five sequential levels each culminating in boss encounters; bonus stages unlocked by discovering bells within levels; continues earned through bonus stage point performance.
replayability_hooks: Bonus stage discovery and optimization for maximum points
Power-up selection strategy variation across playthroughs
Continue conservation mechanics reward skilled play
Score accumulation for extra lives/attacks purchase

world_building_techniques: Premise-driven motivation: rescue sister quest frames progression
Character license leverage: Jackie Chan brand identity carries narrative weight without exposition

boss_design.philosophy: Skill gates at level conclusions requiring mastery of combat mechanics and resource management learned in preceding stages.

danger_signals: Single-life consequence structure discourages casual engagement
Orb loss on death creates frustration potential
Limited power-up capacity creates choice paralysis moments
environmental_storytelling: Bell placement signals bonus stage opportunities (player education through environmental cues)
Frog carriers indicate power-up/health item availability (enemy-as-resource signaling)
